app.name: Trialibre
app.tagline: Find clinical trials for your patients

wizard.welcome_title: Find clinical trials for your patients.
wizard.welcome_subtitle: Trialibre checks your patient's information against trial eligibility criteria and shows you which trials they may qualify for.
wizard.processing_title: Choose how Trialibre processes patient information
wizard.local_desc: Patient data stays on your computer. Slower but nothing leaves your device.
wizard.cloud_desc: Faster results. Data sent securely, then deleted.
wizard.code_fail: That code didn't work. Double-check it or try a different one.
wizard.delete_after: Delete patient data after each match
wizard.keep_logs: Keep a log of which trials were matched
wizard.allow_storage: Allow Trialibre to save patient records locally

match.placeholder: Describe your patient. For example: 45-year-old female with Type 2 diabetes, HbA1c 8.2%, diagnosed 3 years ago, currently on metformin 1000mg twice daily.
match.found_summary: Found {{count}} trials your patient may qualify for out of {{total}} reviewed.
match.no_results_tips: Try adding more patient details or broadening your search.
match.strong_desc: Patient appears to meet most eligibility criteria
match.possible_desc: Some criteria could not be verified with available information
match.unlikely_desc: Patient may not meet key eligibility criteria

sandbox.banner: You're using sample data. Set up your AI service to match real patients.

explainer.title: How matching works
explainer.body: Trialibre reads each trial's eligibility requirements and checks them against your patient's information, one by one. Strong Match = most criteria met. Possible Match = some couldn't be verified. Unlikely = key criteria not met. A match is not a guarantee — the trial site does their own screening.

errors.ocr_partial: We read most of your document, but some parts were unclear. Please check the highlighted text.
errors.ocr_fail: We couldn't read this document. Try better lighting or type the details instead.
errors.offline: You're offline. Saved matches are still available.
errors.credits: Your AI service balance is low. Matching may stop working soon.
errors.no_provider: No AI service configured. Using sample data.
